steps.title: Check power cable
steps.instruction: Identify the charging cable and make sure it is fully seated in the laptop.
successHints: The cable should be visibly connected at the port.
If it looks loose, push it in firmly.

steps.title: Check charging port
steps.instruction: Find the charging port and verify the cable is inserted straight and completely.
successHints: If the cable is crooked, reseat it.
Try another compatible port if charging still does not start.

steps.title: Verify charging indicator
steps.instruction: Look for the charging light or the on-screen battery icon to confirm power is flowing.
successHints: A charging icon or light should appear after the cable is fully seated.

docs: If the laptop is not charging, reconnect the cable firmly.
If charging does not begin, switch to another compatible port.
Confirm charging with the indicator light or battery icon.
